sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94981" key="sklhro/bios" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρό-βῐος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n94981.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leading a hard life</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Proll.Hes.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.13G.</biblScope> </bibl>; <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκληρο-βίοτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1608.tlg001:p.107B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phryn.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PS</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.107B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
